# Left2Serve

Left2Serve connects surplus food donors with NGOs, shelters, and volunteers to reduce food waste and feed communities.

## Features
- Browse surplus food listings by category (Events, Restaurants, Hotels, Caterers, Households).
- Interactive map to find food near you.
- Real-time notifications for reservations and collections.
- Community forum to connect and share tips.

## Usage
Users can register as Donors (who post food), NGOs, or Volunteers (who claim and collect food).

This site is AI-agent friendly.
